The Iranian regime is feeling the pain from our maximum pressure campaign. .@SecPompeo: State is hosting the #RoadtoGES Heartland event to celebrate entrepreneurs & innovations of America’s heartland...We’ll be spreading our message on entrepreneurship at @theGESsummit in June. For anyone interested, apply at https://t.co/nSsodoBsa5. #StateDeptStateside https://t.co/tmCTVqONsq

.@SecPompeo at #RoadtoGES: Free enterprise has proven to be the greatest economic model ever conceived...Compare that to socialism, which puts government bureaucrats in control of the economy, and which has failed spectacularly everywhere it’s been tried. #StateDeptStateside https://t.co/YKwI4EoX6Y

.@SecPompeo at #RoadtoGES: Our economic diplomacy efforts align not just with U.S. values, but also with U.S. interests. The goal of all of our work at State is to serve the American people -- including their economic interests. #StateDeptStateside https://t.co/eZQrF84KPi

.@SecPompeo at #RoadtoGES: The Trump administration is re-establishing American leadership. From Iran to North Korea, from NATO to Indo-Pacific, the Trump administration is building partnerships & empowering those partners to deliver on our shared objectives. #StateDeptStateside https://t.co/d1zjfI6iLL

.@SecPompeo to the delegation from the #Netherlands at #RoadtoGES: I want all of you to know how much we are thinking of you. America stands with you. We will continue to do all we can to help you in this terrible time of tragedy. @USEmbTheHague @DutchMFA @NLintheUSA https://t.co/uxLCgVxZ9e

The brutal regime in #Iran has a disgraceful human rights record. Iranian truck drivers, teachers, students, farmers, women’s rights advocates & others have protested the regime’s repression. For four decades, the #HumanRights reports have served as an objective and thorough record of human rights conditions around the world providing enduring guidance for our foreign policy. Learn more about the newly released 2018 Reports here. https://t.co/vdBWqYp0E4
Today, @StateDRL Ambassador Michael Kozak delivered remarks on the 2018 Country Reports on #HumanRights Practices at the @ForeignPressCtr. https://t.co/ctsV84vQSL https://t.co/wi5roNjSG5
This afternoon, @SecPompeo welcomed @UN Secretary-General @AntonioGuterres to the State Department. https://t.co/V28bLyWGCU

.@SecPompeo on #HumanRights Report: Iran, South Sudan, Nicaragua, China, even some of our allies have shortcomings. Our aim is to identify human rights challenges & use American influence & power to move every nation toward better human rights practices. https://t.co/bNDWYYR81c https://t.co/F3L94QPmKs

.@SecPompeo on #HumanRights Report: By issuing today’s report, we deploy the truth – the truth about abuses occurring across the globe – as one of the most powerful weapons in America’s diplomatic arsenal. https://t.co/bNDWYYR81c https://t.co/TWg2SbSZud

.@SecPompeo on #HumanRights Report: We hope this report will push governments to change course and cause oppressive regimes to honor human rights in places where voices are often silenced and deep yearnings for tolerance and respect go unfulfilled. https://t.co/bNDWYYR81c https://t.co/4lsLKRk4zJ

Today, the Department of State will release the 2018 Country Reports on Human Rights Practices. @SecPompeo will deliver on-camera remarks on the release of the reports at approximately 11:00 a.m. EDT. Watch live here or at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/Rx5GnEIOEs
Yesterday in Houston, @SecPompeo delivered the keynote address at #CERAWeek’s “Reshaping the Energy Future” conference. Read his full remarks here: https://t.co/HuKzPUsE2y https://t.co/YXX2L1v9mN

During #CERAWeek, @SecPompeo joined @SecretaryPerry for an interview with @CNBC to discuss U.S. energy policy and diplomacy's role in promoting energy security. Watch the full interview here: https://t.co/Yqcod5peTB

.@SecPompeo at #CERAWeek: @StateDept wants to work with you to achieve these goals & promote America’s energy model. We need each other. It is American producers, working in tandem with American diplomats, who create stability & prosperity around the world. #StateDeptStateside https://t.co/KiHXKWP4He

.@SecPompeo at #CERAWeek: #Iran’s role in global energy markets is diminishing. Its exports have tanked, thanks in large part to our pressure campaign. We’re committed to bringing Iranian crude oil exports to zero as quickly as market conditions will permit. #StateDeptStateside https://t.co/SHd0PD9Xti

.@SecPompeo at #CERAWeek: We’re not just exporting our energy, we’re exporting our commercial value system. The more we can spread the U.S. model of free & fair competition to these places, the more we can encourage energy diversity & stability of supply. #StateDeptStateside https://t.co/EKuOwbDDPt

.@SecPompeo at #CERAWeek: Today we’re exporting crude oil at levels that were previously unimaginable. When it comes to global supply, U.S. oil production rose at the fastest pace in history – the largest one year increase the world has ever seen. #StateDeptStateside https://t.co/t2zoZsiMJY
Live now: @SecPompeo delivers keynote remarks at #CERAWeek2019’s “Reshaping the Energy Future” conference in Houston, Texas. https://t.co/gWydqdpoCC
